title: 难蚌尖塔
description:
Meme Cards: Chaos Deck is a Slay the Spire-inspired roguelike deckbuilding game, and a bizarre collision between traditional Chinese culture and internet absurdist meme culture.

Inside this strange and ridiculous pagoda, some cards have been empowered by the force of memes, gaining mysterious and overwhelming powers. You will step into the tower as an adventurer, build your deck, defeat enemies, and climb ever higher. As clues gradually emerge across repeated runs, the secrets hidden beyond the mist will slowly be revealed...

Join our QQ group to discuss the game and share feedback:
Meme Cards: Chaos Deck Core Group: 1080358066

Deep Strategic DeckbuildingThe game features a large amount of content:

• 400+ carefully designed cards

• 10+ different card pools, each with its own style and visual identity

• 200+ Relics with unique effects

• 60+ powerful Blessings

• Nearly 100 Consumable items that can be stockpiled without limit

As your adventure goes deeper, the synergies between characters, cards, and Relics will transform through every decision you make. Over time, your build can evolve into a powerful archetype capable of sweeping through enemies, delivering a satisfying and highly strategic deckbuilding experience.

Exhaust builds, discard builds, poison builds, infinitely scaling card builds with a wuxia flavor, gold-scaling builds, body-cultivation builds, Wisdom builds, Authority builds, and all kinds of infinite combos, big or small — once these archetypes come together, they can turn the entire run around and let you crush bosses with one hand.

Every run brings a fresh experience.

Easy to Pick Up, Ready AnytimeA single run takes around 15–40 minutes.

Whether you want a quick adventure during a short break or a deeper dive into deck synergies and combat strategy, the game offers a complete, compact, and satisfying experience.

Challenge Higher DifficultiesIf the standard challenge is no longer enough, you can take on higher difficulty modes or push your limits in Endless Mode.

If you manage to create an infinite combo, you can verify it against the Chapter 3 boss or the bosses in Endless Mode. Once verified, your infinite combo achievement will be recorded in your run history.

Are you ready to step into this bizarre pagoda and begin an adventure of your own?

P.S. Steam Workshop support and related creation tools are currently in development, including a card editor, Relic editor, and more. They are expected to be added to the game in June or July. As long as you have an idea, you will be able to create your own mod, bring your favorite content into the game, and share it with friends to multiply the fun.
description_short: Meme Cards: Chaos Deck is a meme-fueled roguelike deckbuilder where traditional Chinese culture crashes into internet absurdity. Build wild decks from meme-powered cards, defeat bizarre enemies, climb a twisted pagoda, and uncover the secrets hidden beyond the mist across repeated runs.
